data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Remote participant visibility on classroom screen', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions that remote students are visible on a 55" screen, there is no concrete evidence provided to demonstrate that this visibility is effectively implemented or functioning as required. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of remote participant visibility on the classroom screen.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
